chapter_title.en: Chapter 193 – The Tawaaf of the women (Tawaaf Al-Nisaa)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/204)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/204)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ الْمُتَمَتِّعَةِ تَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ وَ بِالصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ لِلْحَجِّ ثُمَّ تَرْجِعُ إِلَى مِنًى قَبْلَ أَنْ تَطُوفَ بِالْبَيْتِ فَقَالَ أَ لَيْسَ تَزُورُ الْبَيْتَ قُلْتُ بَلَى قَالَ فَلْتَطُفْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ibn Muskan, from Al Halby who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the woman performing Tumatto performing Tawaaf by the House (Kabah), and by Al-Safa and Al-Marwa for the Hajj. Then she returns to Mina before she performs Tawaaf of the House (Kabah)’. So heasws said: ‘Did she not visit the House (Kabah)?’ I said, ‘Yes’. Heasws said: ‘So let her perform Tawaaf’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from ibn Muskan from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a woman for al-Tamattu‘ (advantageous) who performs Tawaf around the House, performs Sa‘y between al-Safa’ and al-Marwah for al-Hajj; then returns to Mina’ before performing Tawaf around the House. He (the Imam) said, ‘Is it not a fact that she must visit the House?’ I replied, ‘Yes, it is true.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘She then must perform Tawaf.’”
